a.xlink:title: Returns the euclidian distance to the closest vertex found.
Returns the distance to the found triangle.
Returns the coordinates of the vertex.
Returns the normal of the vertex.
Returns the normal of the edge.
Returns the edge's vertex with index 0 or 1.
Returns parametric description value (index 0,1) of projected point.
Returns the vector from the search point to the projection point.
Returns the outer normal of the triangle.
Returns triangle vertex with index 0, 1 or 2.
Returns parametric description value (index 0, 1, 2) of proj. point.
Print bounds of bounding box, output operator overload.
